scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @rigyn/terminal && npm run build:offline --workspace @rigyn/models && npm run build --workspace @rigyn/kernel && npm run build --workspace rigyn
scripts.check: npm run check:dependencies && npm run check:workspaces && npm run build && npm run check --workspace @rigyn/terminal && npm run check --workspace @rigyn/models && npm run check --workspace @rigyn/kernel && npm run check --workspace rigyn
scripts.test:coverage:risk: npm run build --workspace @rigyn/terminal && npm run build:offline --workspace @rigyn/models && npm run build --workspace @rigyn/kernel && npm run build --workspace rigyn && npm run test:coverage:risk --workspace rigyn
